tasks.title: Entity Detail Email Compose Wiring - Wire existing EmailCompose component into Compose buttons on Lead and Contact detail pages. Pre-fill recipient. Open as Sheet overlay. Connect to email send API via EmailServiceAdapter. Follows IFC-144 and PG-141 (Pattern 1 + Pattern 2). Resolves WIRE-IFC-144-001 and WIRE-PG-141-001.
tasks.description: Entity Detail Email Compose Wiring - Wire existing EmailCompose component into Compose buttons on Lead and Contact detail pages. Pre-fill recipient. Open as Sheet overlay. Connect to email send API via EmailServiceAdapter. Follows IFC-144 and PG-141 (Pattern 1 + Pattern 2). Resolves WIRE-IFC-144-001 and WIRE-PG-141-001.

tasks.title: Email Open Tracking Integration - Real email open/click tracking. Backend: tracking pixel endpoint recording opens; click-through URL wrapper; EmailTracking model. Frontend: replace activity-derived open rate with real data on Lead and Contact detail. Inject pixel + wrap links on outbound send. Follows IFC-144 and IFC-099 (Pattern 1 - infra-only). Resolves WIRE-IFC-099-001.
tasks.description: Email Open Tracking Integration - Real email open/click tracking. Backend: tracking pixel endpoint recording opens; click-through URL wrapper; EmailTracking model. Resolves WIRE-IFC-099-001.

tasks.definitionOfDone: Tracking pixel injected; opens recorded; click-through tracked; real open rate on entity detail; privacy-compliant; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Lead List Saved Views and Filter Persistence - Sidebar view params (?view=my, ?view=starred, ?segment=hot) are completely ignored by LeadsPageClient (no useSearchParams call). Fix: (1) Wire URL params to filter state, (2) Add saved views CRUD (name, filters, columns, sort), (3) Column visibility picker UI exposing DataTable VisibilityState, (4) Persist filter/sort/view selection in localStorage or user preferences.
tasks.description: Lead List Saved Views and Filter Persistence - Sidebar view params (?view=my, ?view=starred, ?segment=hot) are completely ignored by LeadsPageClient (no useSearchParams call). Fix: (1) Wire URL params to filter state, (2) Add saved views CRUD (name, filters, columns, sort), (3) Column visibility picker UI exposing DataTable VisibilityState, (4) Persist filter/sort/view selection in localStorage or user preferences.
tasks.summary: URL params filter lead list correctly; saved views can be created/edited/deleted; column picker toggles visibility; filter/sort state persists across navigation; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: URL params filter lead list correctly; saved views can be created/edited/deleted; column picker toggles visibility; filter/sort state persists across navigation; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: URL params filter lead list correctly; saved views can be created/edited/deleted; column picker toggles visibility; filter/sort state persists across navigation; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Lead Detail AI Chat Panel - Add AI chat panel to Lead detail page for entity-scoped conversations. Backend: conversation.router.ts is fully built with 13 endpoints but NOT registered in router.ts - register it. Frontend: build LeadChatPanel component using conversation API with contextType=LEAD, contextId=leadId. Similar to dashboard TeamChatWidget but with real API calls (TeamChatWidget is decorative with hardcoded messages). ConversationRecord/MessageRecord Prisma models exist.
tasks.description: Lead Detail AI Chat Panel - Add AI chat panel to Lead detail page for entity-scoped conversations. Backend: conversation.router.ts is fully built with 13 endpoints but NOT registered in router.ts - register it. Frontend: build LeadChatPanel component using conversation API with contextType=LEAD, contextId=leadId. Similar to dashboard TeamChatWidget but with real API calls (TeamChatWidget is decorative with hardcoded messages). ConversationRecord/MessageRecord Prisma models exist.
tasks.summary: conversation router registered in router.ts; LeadChatPanel component sends/receives messages via API; entity-scoped to current lead; message history persisted; streaming responses; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: conversation router registered in router.ts; LeadChatPanel component sends/receives messages via API; entity-scoped to current lead; message history persisted; streaming responses; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: conversation router registered in router.ts; LeadChatPanel component sends/receives messages via API; entity-scoped to current lead; message history persisted; streaming responses; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Lead Event Pipeline - Persistent Outbox + Webhooks. Fix HIGH/LOW issues: (1) InMemoryEventBus loses all events on server restart - no persistent outbox pattern [W3]. (2) No webhook handlers for lead events - external systems cannot subscribe [W9]. Fix: Implement transactional outbox pattern for lead domain events (LeadCreatedEvent, LeadQualifiedEvent, etc.). Add webhook dispatch for lead events. Ensure event ordering and at-least-once delivery.
tasks.description: Lead Event Pipeline - Persistent Outbox + Webhooks. Fix HIGH/LOW issues: (1) InMemoryEventBus loses all events on server restart - no persistent outbox pattern [W3]. (2) No webhook handlers for lead events - external systems cannot subscribe [W9]. Fix: Implement transactional outbox pattern for lead domain events (LeadCreatedEvent, LeadQualifiedEvent, etc.). Add webhook dispatch for lead events. Ensure event ordering and at-least-once delivery.
tasks.summary: Lead events persisted to outbox table; outbox processor dispatches to webhook subscribers; events survive server restart; at-least-once delivery guaranteed; webhook payload schema documented; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: Lead events persisted to outbox table; outbox processor dispatches to webhook subscribers; events survive server restart; at-least-once delivery guaranteed; webhook payload schema documented; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Lead events persisted to outbox table; outbox processor dispatches to webhook subscribers; events survive server restart; at-least-once delivery guaranteed; webhook payload schema documented; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Contact Event Pipeline — Worker Handlers + Event Types. (1) Zero contact event handlers in events worker (W-02). (2) Only 2/8 contact event types in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES — missing deleted, account_associated, account_disassociated, converted_from_lead, linked_to_lead, interacted (W-04). (3) No webhook routing for contact events (W-05). (4) No notifications for contact events (W-11). Cross-ref: W-01 (InMemoryEventBus) shared with IFC-250. Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §17.
tasks.description: Contact Event Pipeline — Worker Handlers + Event Types. (1) Zero contact event handlers in events worker (W-02). (2) Only 2/8 contact event types in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES — missing deleted, account_associated, account_disassociated, converted_from_lead, linked_to_lead, interacted (W-04). (3) No webhook routing for contact events (W-05). (4) No notifications for contact events (W-11). Cross-ref: W-01 (InMemoryEventBus) shared with IFC-250. Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §17.
tasks.summary: Events worker has handlers for all 8 contact event types; DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES updated; webhook routing for contact events; notification handlers for key events; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: Events worker has handlers for all 8 contact event types; DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES updated; webhook routing for contact events; notification handlers for key events; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Events worker has handlers for all 8 contact event types; DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES updated; webhook routing for contact events; notification handlers for key events; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Contact Merge & Duplicate Detection Wiring. (1) mergeContacts deletes secondary without re-parenting all child records — orphaned opportunities/tasks (W-03). (2) findPotentialDuplicates exists in service but no tRPC procedure exposes it (W-09). (3) mergeContacts exists but no router procedure wraps it (W-10). (4) mergeContacts no cross-tenant check between primary and secondary (W-12). (5) associateWithAccount inside mergeContacts causes double-save and potential double event emission (W-13). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §17.
tasks.description: Contact Merge & Duplicate Detection Wiring. (1) mergeContacts deletes secondary without re-parenting all child records — orphaned opportunities/tasks (W-03). (2) findPotentialDuplicates exists in service but no tRPC procedure exposes it (W-09). (3) mergeContacts exists but no router procedure wraps it (W-10). (4) mergeContacts no cross-tenant check between primary and secondary (W-12). (5) associateWithAccount inside mergeContacts causes double-save and potential double event emission (W-13). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §17.
tasks.summary: Merge re-parents all child records before deleting secondary; tRPC procedures for findDuplicates and mergeContacts; cross-tenant check; no double-save; UI merge workflow; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: Merge re-parents all child records before deleting secondary; tRPC procedures for findDuplicates and mergeContacts; cross-tenant check; no double-save; UI merge workflow; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Merge re-parents all child records before deleting secondary; tRPC procedures for findDuplicates and mergeContacts; cross-tenant check; no double-save; UI merge workflow; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Contact Email & AI Integration. (1) No email-to-contact matching — inbound emails not linked to contacts by sender address (W-06). (2) No automated AI insight triggering — contact create/update doesn't trigger scoring like lead does (W-07). (3) No contact routing rules — leads have routing but contacts don't (W-14). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §17.

(2) No automated AI insight triggering — contact create/update doesn't trigger scoring like lead does (W-07). (3) No contact routing rules — leads have routing but contacts don't (W-14). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §17.
tasks.summary: Inbound emails matched to contacts by sender address; contact mutations trigger AI scoring; basic contact routing rules; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: Inbound emails matched to contacts by sender address; contact mutations trigger AI scoring; basic contact routing rules; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Inbound emails matched to contacts by sender address; contact mutations trigger AI scoring; basic contact routing rules; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Account Event Pipeline — Worker Handlers + Event Types. (1) Zero account event handlers in events worker (W-01). (2) Zero account event types in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES map (W-02). (3) Audit handler has 3 account event mappings (Created/Updated/Deleted) but events never reach it because worker has no handlers and dispatcher has no types (W-03). Add event handlers for AccountCreated, AccountUpdated, AccountDeleted (requires IFC-271), AccountRevenueUpdated, AccountHierarchyUpdated, AccountIndustryCategorized to events worker. Register all types in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES. Cross-ref: W-01/W-02 pattern shared with Contact (IFC-261). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 14.
tasks.description: Account Event Pipeline — Worker Handlers + Event Types. (1) Zero account event handlers in events worker (W-01). (2) Zero account event types in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES map (W-02). (3) Audit handler has 3 account event mappings (Created/Updated/Deleted) but events never reach it because worker has no handlers and dispatcher has no types (W-03). Add event handlers for AccountCreated, AccountUpdated, AccountDeleted (requires IFC-271), AccountRevenueUpdated, AccountHierarchyUpdated, AccountIndustryCategorized to events worker. Register all types in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES. Cross-ref: W-01/W-02 pattern shared with Contact (IFC-261). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 14.
tasks.summary: Events worker has handlers for all 6 account event types; DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES updated; audit handler receives events; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: Events worker has handlers for all 6 account event types; DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES updated; audit handler receives events; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Events worker has handlers for all 6 account event types; DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES updated; audit handler receives events; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Deal Event Pipeline — Worker Handlers. (1) Only opportunity.won has a handler in events worker; opportunity.created, opportunity.stage_changed, and opportunity.lost are defined in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES but have NO registered handlers (W-01). (2) No OpportunityDescriptionUpdatedEvent defined — description changes emit no event (W-02). Add handlers for the 3 missing event types. Add OpportunityDescriptionUpdatedEvent to domain. Cross-ref: same pattern as Account (IFC-272) and Contact (IFC-261). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 7.
tasks.description: Deal Event Pipeline — Worker Handlers. (1) Only opportunity.won has a handler in events worker; opportunity.created, opportunity.stage_changed, and opportunity.lost are defined in DOMAIN_EVENT_TYPES but have NO registered handlers (W-01). (2) No OpportunityDescriptionUpdatedEvent defined — description changes emit no event (W-02). Add handlers for the 3 missing event types. Add OpportunityDescriptionUpdatedEvent to domain. Cross-ref: same pattern as Account (IFC-272) and Contact (IFC-261). Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 7.
tasks.summary: Events worker has handlers for opportunity.created/stage_changed/lost; OpportunityDescriptionUpdatedEvent added to domain; all 5 event types handled; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDone: Events worker has handlers for opportunity.created/stage_changed/lost; OpportunityDescriptionUpdatedEvent added to domain; all 5 event types handled; tests >=90%
tasks.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: Events worker has handlers for opportunity.created/stage_changed/lost; OpportunityDescriptionUpdatedEvent added to domain; all 5 event types handled; tests >=90%

tasks.title: Agent/Conversation Router Frontend Wiring. 17 dead endpoints (13 conversation.* + 4 agent.*) with zero frontend callers. Frontend uses autoResponse/aiReview/aiMonitoring routers that query the same DB tables directly bypassing the canonical conversation router. Fix: wire all endpoints to proper frontend consumers — chat panel, agent-approvals, AI Search, admin dashboard — and refactor aiMonitoring to delegate to conversation router instead of duplicating DB queries. Audit: artifacts/reports/dead-endpoints-audit.csv rows 4-18.
tasks.description: Agent/Conversation Router Frontend Wiring. 17 dead endpoints (13 conversation.* + 4 agent.*) with zero frontend callers. Audit: artifacts/reports/dead-endpoints-audit.csv rows 4-18.
tasks.summary: All 17 endpoints wired to frontend callers; aiMonitoring delegates to conversation router (no duplicate Prisma queries); agent-approvals uses conversation.approveToolCall/escalate/getPendingApprovals; AI Search wires conversation.search;...

tasks.title: Contact Enrichment Pipeline — Automated background job that periodically enriches contact/lead data from external providers (Clearbit, Apollo). Includes: BullMQ queue intelliflow-contact-enrichment, enrichment adapter with rate limiting, on-create trigger in contact.router.ts, periodic cron sweep for stale profiles (>30 days), cost tracking via CostTracker, field updates (company, title, social profiles, industry)
tasks.description: Contact Enrichment Pipeline — Automated background job that periodically enriches contact/lead data from external providers (Clearbit, Apollo). Includes: BullMQ queue intelliflow-contact-enrichment, enrichment adapter with rate limiting, on-create trigger in contact.router.ts, periodic cron sweep for stale profiles (>30 days), cost tracking via CostTracker, field updates (company, title, social profiles, industry)
tasks.summary: External enrichment provider adapter with rate limiting; BullMQ queue intelliflow-contact-enrichment wired with producer on contact create; periodic cron sweep for stale profiles; cost tracking per call via CostTracker;...
tasks.definitionOfDone: External enrichment provider adapter with rate limiting; BullMQ queue intelliflow-contact-enrichment wired with producer on contact create; periodic cron sweep for stale profiles; cost tracking per call via CostTracker; contact fields updated: company, title, social profiles, industry; >=90% test coverage; all 4 validations pass
